Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml.SamlAssertionValidator.Builder

Packages that use SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml
SAML 2.0 assertion validation for the Juneau REST server, layered on the AuthFilter framework.

  • Uses of SamlAssertionValidator.Builder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.saml that return SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.algorithms(String... values)
    Replaces the default signature-algorithm allowlist with the supplied URIs.
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.clock(Clock value)
    Overrides the Clock used for timestamp validation.
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.clockSkew(Duration value)
    Sets the clock-skew tolerance for NotBefore / NotOnOrAfter validation.
    static SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.create()
    Static creator.
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.decryptionCredential(org.opensaml.security.credential.Credential value)
    Sets the credential used to decrypt <EncryptedAssertion> elements.
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.expectedIssuer(String value)
    Sets the expected IdP issuer (the <Issuer> element).
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.metadataResolver(org.opensaml.saml.metadata.resolver.MetadataResolver value)
    Sets the MetadataResolver used to resolve the IdP's signing credential at validation time.
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.signingCredential(org.opensaml.security.credential.Credential value)
    Sets a static IdP signing credential.
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder
    SamlAssertionValidator.Builder.spEntityId(String value)
    Sets the Service Provider entity ID used to validate <AudienceRestriction>.
